title: Update Secret
content:
# Update Secret

Update an existing Secret with a new 'value'. Any parameters that are not provided will remain unchanged.

## Endpoint

`POST /secrets/{secret_name}/update`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.secret.updateSecret()
print(response)

parameters.name: secret_name
parameters.description: Secret key `name` to update. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `-` characters.

value.description: The actual secret. Once this is set you can not change or see it from Kelvin API. Retrieval of the value can only be done through an App.

name.description: Unique identifier `name` for the Secret. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `-` characters.

created.description: UTC time when the Secret was first created, formatted in RFC 3339.

created_by.description: Name of the user that created the Secret.

updated.description: UTC time when the Secret was first updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

updated_by.description: Name of the user that updated the Secret.
